description.ko: 빛 한 점 들지 않는 칠흑 같은 심해의 심연 속에서, 스스로 빛을 내는 생명체들이 선사하는 신비롭고 경이로운 빛의 향연을 감상해 보세요.
description.en: Descend into the midnight zone of the deep ocean, where rare bioluminescent life forms create a stunning display of light within the crushing silence of the abyss.

prompt: Hyper-realistic cinematic underwater footage of the abyssal zone, bioluminescent jellyfish and glowing deep-sea organisms illuminating the dark void, hydrothermal vents casting golden light, obsidian-colored water, ethereal atmosphere, 8k resolution, macro photography style.
